allow: Bash(python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\); from backend.main import app; print\('Import OK'\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k\) for k in d['paths'].keys\(\) if 'global' in k or 'admin' in k]")

PowerShell(Start-Process -FilePath "powershell" -ArgumentList "-NoProfile -Command `"cd 'd:\\canal_audit_system\\backend'; .\\.venv\\Scripts\\uvicorn.exe main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8005 2>&1 | Out-File -FilePath 'backend.log' -Encoding utf8`"" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; Write-Host "Started")

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8005 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep 1; $env:DB_HOST="localhost"; $env:DB_NAME="Irrigation"; $env:DB_USER="postgres"; $env:DB_PASSWORD="123456"; $env:DB_PORT="5432"; Start-Process -FilePath "d:\\canal_audit_system\\.venv\\Scripts\\uvicorn.exe" -ArgumentList "main:app","--host","0.0.0.0","--port","8005" -WorkingDirectory "d:\\canal_audit_system\\backend" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep 3; Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:8005/api/health)

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in p.items\(\) if k in \('project_name','health_pct','type_of_project','dpr_location','sanctioned_amount','est_completed','est_incomplete'\)}, indent=2\)\) for p in data[:2]]")

PowerShell($login = Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri "http://localhost:8005/api/auth/login" -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"username":"latief","password":"password123"}'; $token = $login.token; $projects = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8005/api/projects" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"}; $projects[0..1] | Select-Object project_name,health_pct,type_of_project,dpr_location,sanctioned_amount,est_completed,est_incomplete | ConvertTo-Json)

PowerShell($login = Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri "http://localhost:8005/api/auth/login" -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"username":"admin","password":"admin123"}'; $token = $login.token; $projects = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8005/api/projects" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"}; $projects[0..1] | Select-Object project_name,health_pct,type_of_project,dpr_location,sanctioned_amount,est_completed,est_incomplete | ConvertTo-Json)
